events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. This is a garage subpanel (not service equipment), so the neutral must float isolated from the enclosure — but the bonding screw is installed and neutrals/grounds share one bar, creating an illegal neutral-ground bond with a parallel current path over the equipment grounding conductors. Combined with a double-tapped breaker terminal and an open knockout, this fails inspection at high risk. Findings, corrective actions, and code references are written to `/app/answer.json`.
